title: Sheets and Pillows Get Their Day
story: Every September 11, people across the country celebrate National Make Your Bed Day by doing something most kids try to avoid! Families post before-and-after photos of messy rooms transformed into neat spaces. Some hotels even offer free breakfast to guests who make their own beds.
activity_question: What do some hotels offer guests who make their own beds on this day?
follow_up_question: What's the hardest part about making your bed perfectly?
